question: On which day do the Xandrians celebrate their New Year?

answers.original: The Xandrians celebrate their New Year on Dual Zenith Day.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer that.

entities.name: Xandrians
entities.description: Xandrians are the inhabitants of the planet Xandria who celebrate their New Year on Dual Zenith Day.

entities.name: Dual Zenith Day
entities.description: Dual Zenith Day is the Xandrian New Year celebration when the twin suns of Xandria's system align.

entities.name: Xandrian New Year
entities.description: The Xandrian New Year is celebrated on Dual Zenith Day according to their ancient calendar.

relations.description: Xandrians celebrate their New Year on Dual Zenith Day.
Dual Zenith Day marks the Xandrian New Year according to their ancient calendar.
